role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text/script and abstained from linguistic analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (steppe, deciduous trees).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (broadleaf deciduous) and agricultural structures (hoop houses).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (concrete poles, cross-arms) and road markings.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design + tree painting) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country (Ukraine) by leveraging strong visual markers (concrete poles, whitewashed trees) that were consistently identified by the specialists. The reasoning was grounded in the image and effectively used the tournament to resolve the Ukraine/Russia ambiguity.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and trees match image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of deciduous trees and greenhouses match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles and road quality match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues is consistent with image content.
